choices: In the same cycle as the antecedent
items.explain: Bar-arrow implication evaluates b in the same cycle where a is true.

choices: On the next cycle after the antecedent
In the same cycle as the antecedent
items.explain: Double-arrow implication shifts the check to the cycle after a is true.

items.prompt: If antecedent a never goes high, an implication can be vacuously satisfied.
items.explain: No failing attempt occurs when a never fires—green but uninformative about b.

items.prompt: In the starter overlap pass preset, both a and b are high at…
items.explain: Starter loads overlapping pass with a and b high together at cycle 2.

items.prompt: The sva-timeline browser lab is mainly for…
choices: Reading pass, fail, and vacuous on short waves
items.explain: The lab is a concept sketch for timeline literacy in SV testbench work.
